brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

brand_identity.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive more traffic to their website.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search

pain_points: Difficulty in tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
Inability to compete with other brands in AI search results
Difficulty in identifying areas for improvement in AI search optimization
messaging_angles: Optimize for the future of search
Drive more traffic to your website

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Industry benchmarks for data-analytics products on LinkedIn
content_brief.reasoning: With a feature_count of 6 and a pain_point_count of 5, a carousel is the best content_type to showcase the product's distinct features and address multiple pain points. The proof_point_count of 2 and research_proof_point_count of 4 provide sufficient substance for a deeper treatment, supporting the selection of carousel. The brand_tone is minimal, which is suitable for educational content. Although has_strong_stat is True, the lack of has_customer_name means a single_image may not be the best choice. Given the content_depth is 'long_form' due to the number of features and proof points, a carousel is the most suitable choice.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty in tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines daily
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO tools that focus on traditional search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the impact of AI search on brand visibility

linkedin_content.hook: AI search is changing the game for brand visibility
linkedin_content.body: Your brand's visibility in AI search results has a direct impact on customer acquisition and retention. Manually tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines is a time-consuming task. Inaccurate insights from manual tracking can lead to poor decision-making. Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines, providing accurate insights that inform marketing strategies. By using Searchable, brands have seen a significant improvement in their online visibility, with some experiencing up to 206% share of voice improvements. If you're ready to take control of your brand's online visibility, sign up for a trial with Searchable today.
linkedin_content.full_post:
AI search is changing the game for brand visibility

Your brand's visibility in AI search results has a direct impact on customer acquisition and retention. Manually tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines is a time-consuming task. Inaccurate insights from manual tracking can lead to poor decision-making. Searchable helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines, providing accurate insights that inform marketing strategies. By using Searchable, brands have seen a significant improvement in their online visibility, with some experiencing up to 206% share of voice improvements. If you're ready to take control of your brand's online visibility, sign up for a trial with Searchable today.

#AISearch #BrandVisibility #DigitalMarketing #Searchable

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, with a clear explanation of the problem and the solution provided by Searchable. The hook is clear but does not create a specific daily friction or surprising number, it's a general statement about AI search. The tone is mostly straightforward and avoids jargon, but the phrase 'changing the game' could be seen as slightly off-voice. The claim about 206% share of voice improvements is directly supported by the proof_point and is not fabricated.
